name: Hivelocity Inc. fka Digital Energy Technologies Limited (Global)
notes:
We are Heficed with a presence in most of the continents providing services such as:

- IP Resource Management
- IP Transit
- Cloud Computing
- Bare-Metal Infrastructure

Our facilities are located in:

- Los Angeles, CA
- Chicago, IL
- Reston, VA
- São Paulo, Brazil
- London, United Kingdom
- Frankfurt, Germany
- Johannesburg, South Africa
- Milan, Italy
- Lagos, Nigeria

Each facility is connected to Tier 1 networks and major Internet Exchanges.

We have an open peering policy and we peer with everyone who sees benefit from peering with our network.

Send us your peering path details to peering@hivelocity.net in order to initiate direct connectivity with us.
